violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Refrigerator found at ~45 to 47F.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Defrost-clean bottom interior freezer. -Residue at rice cooker and handles.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooling of potentially hazardous food was not accomplished using proper methods. -Rice removed from heat at 12, placed into gallon bags into freezer to cool and then tighltly packed in bins in refrigerator before being fully cooled (4 bags per bin). Found at 48F at edge rice and 59F in center bags *Placed about half of product in freezer with bags spread out and directed to reheat/refry the other half ASAP. All product made is for today's use only.
General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Door left open for air flow is not screened.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
